scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm -C backend exec pip install -r requirements.txt && pnpm -C frontend install && pnpm -C simulator exec pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:simulator
scripts.fix: ruff format backend && ruff check backend --fix && pnpm -C frontend run format
scripts.lint: ruff check backend && pnpm -C frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: mypy backend && pnpm -C frontend exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.migrate:make: pnpm -C backend exec python manage.py makemigrations
scripts.migrate: pnpm -C backend exec python manage.py migrate
